summary: Audience recording with a crippling dropout at the peak of the China Cat Sunflower transition
review: The reviewer notes that this could have been an outstanding audience (AUD) tape, but a severe dropout right in the middle of the China Cat Sunflower → Rider transition ruins the listening experience. No musical commentary is provided, so the performance itself remains unassessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review giving a zero‑star rating; strong negative sentiment about a major recording flaw outweighs any unknown show quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Critical dropout at the peak of the China Cat Sunflower transition; otherwise no comments on clarity or mix.
